selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 9.2% and 20-day momentum is 6.1%.
Trend quality is supported by 30% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 4.6% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.1%, downside volatility near 1.3%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.2%.
Volume confirmation is 28.8% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 11.3% versus SPY over 5 days and 5.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.84, confidence 0.79, and 0.8 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.84, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.8 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.94, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.79.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.199 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Medtronic plc (MDT) Acquires SPR Therapeutics to Enhance Pain Intervention Prospects
news_evidence.llm_reason: Acquisition of SPR Therapeutics for ~$650M is a direct corporate action expanding Medtronic's pain-intervention portfolio. This is material company-specific news that can move sentiment and shares in the short term, though deal close, integration and regulatory risk temper the magnitude.
